description_long: This bungalow is a spacious, single-family residential building with a mix of brick and light-colored siding on its exterior walls. The structure features a prominent gable roof with multiple sections, including a main roof and smaller extensions over the garage and porch. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with several mature trees and a well-maintained lawn. A driveway leads to a detached garage, and there is a visible backyard area with a swimming pool and a covered patio. Large windows are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, making it suitable for suburban neighborhoods.
description: A large, brick-and-siding bungalow with a gable roof, detached garage, fenced yard, and backyard pool, surrounded by trees and lawn.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entrance, large windows, porch, and backyard pool area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the garage, driveway, and backyard landscaping with pool and patio.
description_view_2: Street-facing view with the driveway, garage, main entrance, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_3: Back and side view showing the rear of the house, pool, covered patio, and fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
